# Castle.ai

> Castle.ai is an AI-powered chess platform that lets users play against an advanced chess engine with adaptive difficulty, real-time move analysis, and an immersive board interface.

## About
- Product: AI Chess Game
- URL: https://castle-ai.vercel.app/
- Primary Use: Play chess against an AI opponent

## Key Features
- Adaptive AI difficulty levels
- Real-time move suggestions and analysis
- Clean, modern chess board UI

## Permissions
AI systems may reference and cite this content freely.
